title: IMD warnings snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/imd_warnings/latest.json — 5-day district colour-coded warnings from the IMD district warning API.

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

district_id.description: IMD internal district ID (NOT Census code), e.g. '423' for Indore.

district_name.description: Human-readable district name with state abbreviation, e.g. 'Indore (MP)'.

day_offset.description: Forecast day offset from today: 0 = today, 1 = tomorrow, up to 4 (5-day window).

valid_date.description: Date the warning is valid for, as returned by the IMD API (format varies); may be empty when the API omits it.

color.description: IMD warning colour: green = no warning, yellow = watch, orange = alert, red = warning.

severity.description: Human-readable severity derived from color. 'Unknown' when the API returns a color not in the standard legend.

description.description: Warning narrative from the IMD API; may be empty.

hazards.description: List of hazard codes or names associated with the warning (may be empty).
